message:
fix(eval): handle Cast/Collate in eval_group_agg_join_expr (#90)

CAST(SUM(qty*price) AS INTEGER) in GROUP BY context fell through to
per-row evaluation, losing aggregate context and returning NULL. Added
Expr::Cast and Expr::Collate match arms that recurse through the
aggregate-aware path. Also adds conformance test for the pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
